name: keel
description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for landing and marketing pages that must look made, not generated, AND be correct on first server paint. Computes a distinctive theme deterministically from a seed (reproducible OKLCH palette + constraint-filtered font pairing) instead of rotating a recognisable catalog, and prevents the failures a visual review misses — dark-mode flash, hydration mismatches, hidden-until-JS heroes, and layout-shifting loading states. For Next.js, Remix/React Router, SvelteKit, and Astro.
